parameters.content:
## GoToWebinar -> fact_event_daily

Attendance (+ registrant count) that Salesforce lacks, NOW with SF webinar campaign_key attached. Native GoToWebinar node for the webinar list; Registrants + Attendees via http; counts aggregated by pairedItem (robust to n8n splitting the array response).

SF MATCH (20 Jun): 'SF: Get Webinar Campaigns' (executeOnce) fetches Type='Webinar' 2026 campaigns; 'Build Event Rows' matches each GTW webinar -> campaign_key via name-date (dd.mm.yyyy in Campaign.Name == GTW date), else title-overlap + GTW date in [StartDate,EndDate]. NOT Campaign.StartDate (0/4 match). Dry-runs never match (campaign_key null). Reproduces 4/4 on live data.

AFTER IMPORT:
1. Select your 'GoToWebinar OAuth2 API' credential on 'Get Webinars' (native), 'Get Registrants' and 'Get Attendees' (http).
2. SF cred preset on 'SF: Get Webinar Campaigns' (Salesforce account 2).
3. Select your Supabase Postgres credential on both DB nodes (the id in the file is from another instance).
4. (Optional) Config -> from_date (default 2026-01-01) = start of the GTW fetch window; toTime is now. Covers all 2026 webinars. (Was lookback_days=90, which dropped the Feb webinars.)
5. Run once; check fact_event_daily (campaign_key now populated) / v_event_daily / data_quality_log.

Region: webinar SUBJECT first, then TIMEZONE (Europe/London->UKI, Brussels/Luxembourg->BeLux, Amsterdam->NL), else UNASSIGNED.
Grain: webinarKey x start-date (uq_event_grain).

nodes.name: Get Webinars
nodes.notes: Select your predefined GoToWebinar OAuth2 API credential. executeOnce: fed 4 SF campaign items but must run the getAll once.

parameters.query: SELECT Id, Name, Type, Status, StartDate, EndDate FROM Campaign WHERE Type = 'Webinar' AND StartDate >= 2026-01-01 ORDER BY StartDate

nodes.name: SF: Get Webinar Campaigns
nodes.notes: SF webinar campaigns — matched to GTW webinars in 'Build Event Rows' to set campaign_key.

nodes.name: Get Registrants
nodes.notes: Select your predefined GoToWebinar OAuth2 API credential.

nodes.name: Get Attendees
nodes.notes: Select your predefined GoToWebinar OAuth2 API credential.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO fact_event_daily
  (event_key, event_name, activity_date, region_id, campaign_key, registrants, attendees, source)
VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3,
  (SELECT region_id FROM dim_region WHERE region_code = $4),
  $5, $6, $7, $8)
ON CONFLICT ON CONSTRAINT uq_event_grain DO UPDATE SET
  event_name = EXCLUDED.event_name,
  region_id = EXCLUDED.region_id,
  campaign_key = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.campaign_key, fact_event_daily.campaign_key),
  registrants = EXCLUDED.registrants,
  attendees = EXCLUDED.attendees,
  loaded_at = now();

INSERT INTO data_quality_log (source, run_date, rows_in, rows_written, issues, issue_pct)
VALUES ('gotowebinar', CURRENT_DATE, $1, $2, 0, 0);
